subcodes.first_line: O Ali! The Truth, glorified be His majesty, praiseth and extolleth Himself before His loved ones, and thus it is [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی حق جل جلاله از قبل دوستان خود خود را حمد مینماید و ثنا میگوید و اینست
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @praise and encouragement, @rejection, opposition and persecution
